name: Button
description: A versatile button component that can render as a link or button, supports loading state, and applies various style variants.

name: Project
description: A component that displays project details including title, description, tech stack, and links, with animations on hover.

name: SectionFlower
description: An SVG component rendering a flower pattern with optional title and titleId for accessibility.

name: SectionTitle
description: A component that renders a section title with an optional icon, customizable styles, and a default spinning flower icon.

props.name: classNames
props.type: { container?: string; title?: string; icon?: string | undefined; } | undefined

name: TransitionLink
description: A React component that wraps a Next.js Link to perform a GSAP page transition animation before navigating to a new route or executing a click handler.
